default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and alignment between GrowthX and Unstructured teams for producing high-volume, top-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to produce 50 articles/month focused on SEO and LLM influence, with light mentions of Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [DevRel team concerned about accuracy and product positioning in broad content](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Agreement to iterate on initial articles to find balance between volume, accuracy, and strategic value](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Need to develop process for efficiently reviewing/approving content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Goal is to create top-of-funnel awareness content, not deep product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Articles should rank for relevant keywords and influence LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Light mentions of Unstructured acceptable, full accuracy required when product is discussed](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Volume (50 articles/month) is key for SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### DevRel Team Concerns

  - [Worried about inaccuracies or implying product capabilities that don't exist](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Time/effort required to thoroughly review high volume of content](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Unsure of value-add for broad, non-product-specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Suggested product managers may be better suited for some reviews](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)

### Balancing Accuracy and Volume

  - [GrowthX to improve grounding mentions of Unstructured in official docs/website content](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Consider separating articles into "light touch" (minimal review) and "high priority" (full review)](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Iterate on initial set of articles to calibrate process and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [May not need to explicitly call out every unsupported feature if product isn't central focus](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)

### LLM Influence Strategy

  - [More product-specific content needed to shape LLM responses about Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Balance between broad keyword ranking and targeted LLM-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Consider separating strategy for Google search vs LLM influence](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

### Next Steps and Evaluation

  - [GrowthX to revise initial articles based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [DevRel to review revised articles, assess improvement](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [Decide on sustainable review process within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)
  - [Consider building automated fact-checking system using Unstructured's public docs](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to revise and resubmit initial set of articles](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [DevRel team to review revised articles when ready](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [Evaluate content quality and review process sustainability within 7-10 days](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore automated fact-checking system using Unstructured's public documentation](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Determine final content strategy and review workflow based on next iteration results](https://fathom.video/share/RJjSwdgzfqQzcK1eGNs9karqE2iAWHDk?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)

action_items.description: Share document on unstructured use cases and product details with Jason
Review Paul's notes on articles, identify inaccuracies, build knowledge base for factual product mentions
Investigate proofreading workflow using unstructured docs/website to ground product mentions
Revise 3 sample articles, improve unstructured mentions, send for re-review within 10 days
Review revised articles from Jason, focus on product positioning accuracy
Review revised articles from Jason, check for technical accuracy of unstructured mentions
